Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Cook, of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs, appearing via Zoom videconference;
William Beaber, in pro per, Tel. 972.722.4376, for defendants, appearing via Zoom videoconference.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING: Defendant's request for continuance discussed; not granted. The matter is argued. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And Documents Genuine Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 2033.280 For The Failure To Respond The Request For Admission Of Facts And Documents is GRANTED in part. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $5,000. Plaintiff shall prepare the proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302/Discovery.
